prerequisiteBlockers: RESEND_API_KEY is missing from the runtime environment (.env.local)
SRS_RECRUITING_FROM_EMAIL is unset; resolver falls back to DIRECT_DEPOSIT_FROM (HR). Set SRS_RECRUITING_FROM_EMAIL to the approved recruiting sender before live reminder sends.
Sender domain verification: Skipped — RESEND_API_KEY unavailable

steps.action: Resolve all Resend / env blockers; re-run P250 until decision=GO
verify: readinessOverall PASS or WARN with failCount=0
rollback: Do not proceed to any --live command until GO

steps.action: Send single Resend test/canary email (P248 canary-only first recipient path)
verify: Resend dashboard shows delivered/accepted message for canary recipient(s)
rollback: If auth/domain failure: revert DIRECT_DEPOSIT_EMAIL_MODE to log until fixed
Leave reminder store as-is (idempotency keys protect re-send)

steps.action: Operator verifies inbox content, From, Reply-To, and links
verify: Candidate still outstanding in Dropbox after canary
rollback: Abort launch; keep mode=log until copy/domain corrected

steps.action: Send initial open-store paperwork (eligible count from P249)
verify: Eligible would-send count remains 1 after fresh preview
Dropbox Sign shows new signature request for the candidate
rollback: Cancel/void the test signature request in Dropbox Sign if packet was unwanted
Do not flip testMode to production while quota=0
stopConditions: testMode unexpectedly false with production quota=0

steps.action: Verify Dropbox packet created and status probe readable
verify: Signature request id stored on workflow / packet
Status probe returns outstanding (not signed yet)
rollback: Do not start Reminder 1 batch until packet verified
Reconcile missing signatureRequestId before any reminder chase
Interrupt process (Ctrl+C) — in-flight batch finishes current send only
Do not re-run --continue-full until stopReason reviewed
Idempotency keys prevent duplicate reminder numbers for same packet

steps.action: Monitor delivery, bounces, and Dropbox outstanding counts
verify: Outstanding signatures trend down or stable
rollback: Set DIRECT_DEPOSIT_EMAIL_MODE=log if emergency halt needed

steps.action: Refresh Dropbox statuses and eligibility (read-only / preview)
verify: Signed-before-send exclusions increase as candidates complete
Cooldown and idempotent skips remain correct
rollback: Do not apply-safe-corrections without operator review

steps.action: Advance verified signed candidates toward Ready for MEL (manual/authorized)
verify: ~18 candidates in Ready for MEL / verify-signed queues (P249)
Signature complete in Dropbox before MEL load
No automatic MEL API writes from this launch plan
rollback: Do not load MEL for incomplete signatures
Revert workflow status only via authorized operator tooling
stopConditions: Unsigned packet marked Ready for MEL

monitoring: Dropbox Sign: new requests, completions, quota
P249 ops dashboard: reminder buckets, Ready for MEL, blocked manual counts
